# ============================================================================
# ProQuest TDM Studio VM -- paste each block into the Jupyter TERMINAL, in order.
# Run from:  /home/ec2-user/SageMaker/election_arm
# ============================================================================


# --- 1. Write the patched extract_llm.py into the VM ------------------------
#     (chunking + strict schema + hallucination guard; ProQuest daily-cap
#      wording added to the 429 handler so it stops cleanly instead of crashing)
echo  | base64 -d > /home/ec2-user/SageMaker/election_arm/extract_llm.py
python -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('/home/ec2-user/SageMaker/election_arm/extract_llm.py').read()); print('extract_llm.py OK')"


# --- 2. Point the token env var at ProQuest's proxy key ---------------------
#     (extract_llm.py reads the key from an env var, not a file path)
export PROQUEST_TOKEN=$(cat /home/ec2-user/SageMaker/.token/.agaitoken)


# --- 3. Set the interpreter that has openai + lxml --------------------------
#     Confirm the env name with:  conda env list   (pick the sample-* that is NOT -r)
PY=/home/ec2-user/SageMaker/.conda/envs/sample-2025.12.578/bin/python


# --- 4. TEST on 10 articles of one window FIRST -----------------------------
head -n 10 data/raw/proquest_economy_gfc_2008.jsonl > /tmp/gfc_test.jsonl
$PY extract_llm.py \
  --pages /tmp/gfc_test.jsonl \
  --out /tmp/pred_test.jsonl \
  --model gpt_4o_mini \
  --base-url https://agai-proxy.prod.int.tdmstudio.proquest.com/large-language-models-openai-compatible/ \
  --api-key-env PROQUEST_TOKEN \
  --chunk-chars 12000 --sleep 0.5 --limit 10
cat /tmp/pred_test.jsonl | head    # eyeball a few claims before committing to a full run


# --- 5. Full run, one window at a time (resume-safe; rerun after a daily cap)
#     Repeat for each window id. Writes NEW pred_llm_* files (old ones untouched).
for W in oil_1973 volcker_1980 crash_1987 gulf_1990 dotcom_2001 gfc_2008 covid_2020 calm_1965 calm_1995 calm_2005; do
  echo "=== $W ==="
  $PY extract_llm.py \
    --pages data/raw/proquest_economy_${W}.jsonl \
    --out data/predictions/pred_llm_proquest_economy_${W}.jsonl \
    --model gpt_4o_mini \
    --base-url https://agai-proxy.prod.int.tdmstudio.proquest.com/large-language-models-openai-compatible/ \
    --api-key-env PROQUEST_TOKEN \
    --chunk-chars 12000 --sleep 0.5
done


# --- 6. Strip verbatim text before export -----------------------------------
#     extract_llm.py's raw-text field is "quote" (NOT "claim_text"). It MUST be
#     removed or the export leaks ProQuest full text. One-liner strip per file:
cd data/predictions
for F in pred_llm_proquest_economy_*.jsonl; do
  python -c "import json,sys; [print(json.dumps({k:v for k,v in json.loads(l).items() if k!='quote'})) for l in open('$F') if l.strip()]" > "${F%.jsonl}.export.jsonl"
done
tar -czf proquest_llm_exports.tar.gz pred_llm_proquest_economy_*.export.jsonl
ls -lh proquest_llm_exports.tar.gz
cd ../..
# Export proquest_llm_exports.tar.gz via ProQuest's Export Instructions.ipynb.
